The '''CMC-22 mining facility''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility designed by [[Corellia Mining Corporation/Legends|Corellia Mining Corporation]], who sold it to anyone who wished to purchase one, in exchange for a share of the profits. Both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used this almost entirely automated facility to mine raw materials.
